description: Sellsuki MCP Contract Design changelog — tracks all contract versions, changes, and their impact

entries.summary: First enterprise canonical release — all 3 governance docs converted to machine-readable contracts
changes: Created sellsuki.appshell.canonical@2.0.0 — canonical topnav-led shell contract
Created sellsuki.brand.structure@2.0.0 — brand hierarchy and placement contract
Created sellsuki.vibecode.rules@2.0.0 — AI/vibe coding compliance rules contract
Created contract JSON schema at contracts/schema/contract.schema.json
entries.impact: All new products and redesigns must use canonical AppShell 2.0. AI scaffolding must read these contracts.
entries.author: design-system-team

versioning_guide.major: Shell/hierarchy/brand ownership changes — may require product migration
versioning_guide.minor: New defaults or fields added — backwards compatible
versioning_guide.patch: Clarification or metadata only — no behavior change

entry_schema.source_docs: array of source documentation file paths
entry_schema.impact: description of impact on products and teams
entry_schema.author: team or person responsible
